`create([FSDataOutputStream](<../../../core/fs/FSDataOutputStream.html> "class in org.apache.flink.core.fs") out)`

Creates a writer that writes to the given stream.

  * ## Method Details

    * ### create

[BulkWriter](<BulkWriter.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.api.common.serialization")<[T](<BulkWriter.Factory.html> "type parameter in BulkWriter.Factory")> create([FSDataOutputStream](<../../../core/fs/FSDataOutputStream.html> "class in org.apache.flink.core.fs") out) throws [IOException](<https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/io/IOException.html> "class or interface in java.io")

Creates a writer that writes to the given stream.

Parameters:
    `out` \- The output stream to write the encoded data to.
Throws:
    `[IOException](<https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/io/IOException.html> "class or interface in java.io")` \- Thrown if the writer cannot be opened, or if the output stream throws an exception.
